Suggested Itineraries

Explore curated day-by-day plans created by local experts.

1 Day

Kalimpong in a Day

Kalimpong1 Day

Cover major attractions in a single day.

Day Plan Summary

Deolo Hill sunrise, Durpin Monastery

Est. budget:₹2,000-3,000

Weekend Escape

Kalimpong2 Days

Relaxed weekend covering main attractions and KuboVista.

Day Plan Summary

Check-in, Durpin Monastery; Dr. Graham's Homes, Local village walk

Est. budget:₹4,000-6,000

Day Plan Summary

Est. budget:₹3,000-5,000

Pelling & Yuksom Explorer

Pelling3 Days

Explore Pelling and nearby Yuksom in depth.

Pemayangtse Monastery, Rabdentse Ruins; Yuksom village, Dubdi Monastery; Khecheopalri Lake, Kanchenjunga Falls
